programme.desc: Young friends sneak into the woods to search for a mythical creature. When only one of them returns, gravely injured, the SVU team work to locate a suspect and to distinguish the fantasy stories from the reality stories.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Chicago Crossover
programme.desc: Voight, Lindsay and Halstead track a child-pornography victim to his last-know whereabouts in New York City, where Benson and the SVU squad get a new lead. Lindsay discovers someone from her past is involved and hopes to find the ringleader.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Agent Provacateur
programme.desc: A young girl sneaks out of her house to meet a movie star who invited her to a party. Later that night, a patrolman finds her in an alley, sexually assaulted and barely alive. Benson suspects the movie star and his manager are covering up the crime.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Service
programme.desc: The SVU must break through military red tape when a soldier is suspected of sexual assault.

programme.title: Modern Family: Sleeper
programme.desc: Phil fails at his task to stay home and wait for the repairman, forcing him to tell an elaborate lie to hide the truth from Claire, but the stress is more than he can physically handle. Meanwhile, Gloria is responsible for organizing the family portrait.

programme.title: Modern Family: Message Received
programme.desc: Jay, Gloria and Manny challenge each other to step outside their comfort zone and try something new. Mitch and Cam's wedding is getting too big and costly, so they resort to selling a couple of their prized possessions.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam’s big day is finally here and nothing can ruin it, until nothing turns into a whole lot of somethings and puts wedding planner extraordinaire Pepper Saltzman to the test. Jay and Gloria host the Tuckers. Phil squeezes in an eye procedure.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding day chaos continues as the entire party shifts from one contingency plan to another. Guests start to get testy, Mitchell and Cameron are feeling discouraged and poor Claire shows physical wear and tear.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Long Honeymoon
programme.desc: This summer has been exceptionally blissful in the Dunphy house. Alex is away on a humanitarian trip and the rest of the family is getting along swimmingly, but when Alex comes home, there is an immediate shift in mood.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do Not Push
programme.desc: It's Jay and Gloria's anniversary and they can't seem to get on the same page on what kind of gift to give; sentimental or expensive. And, the Dunphys head to Caltech for Alex's college tour.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Design
programme.desc: A distraught pregnant girl accuses a wealthy and successful businessman of rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Ripped
programme.desc: A 17-year-old high school student is brutally attacked by one of her classmates. When the suspect turns out to be the son of Stabler's old partner, Stabler's inability to treat this case like any other case gets him suspended.

programme.title: Dateline: The Goldfinger Mystery
programme.desc: A married couple made an abundance of wealth in gold, but the fortune was never the key to their happiness. In fact, it may have been a motive for murder as business practices are questioned and secrets are finally confessed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets in a Small Town
programme.desc: A mother of three went missing from her home in Alabama, and the news the family received would haunt them forever.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The Watchers
programme.desc: When a researcher with the Department of Defence is found dead, Nell puts her high IQ to the test when she goes undercover as his replacement. Meanwhile, Hetty's ability to lead the team is questioned by the new NCIS Assistant Director, Owen Granger.

programme.title: NCIS: Reveille
programme.desc: The terrorist from 'Bête Noire' returns with a plan to attack the President. Gibbs and his team must follow the clues to reveal his identity and find Kate, who was kidnapped by the terrorist.

programme.title: NCIS: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: Determined to locate Ziva, Tony chases leads in Israel in search of her current whereabouts. Meanwhile, Gibbs and the team continue the hunt for Parsa and his growing terrorist ring.

programme.title: NCIS: Under the Radar
programme.desc: The NCIS team must rely on Twitter for a case involving a missing navy lieutenant. Meanwhile, McGee misplaces his badge, but he withholds the information from Gibbs and the authorities.

programme.title: NCIS: Anonymous Was a Woman
programme.desc: Gibbs and McGee travel to Afghanistan when a murder case leads them to an Afghan women’s shelter Mike Frank’s secretly supported for years.

programme.title: NCIS: Once a Crook

programme.title: NCIS: Oil and Water

programme.title: NCIS: Better Angels

programme.desc: The NCIS team is forced to re-examine a hit-and-run murder case when a former FBI agent-turned-lawyer confides in Gibbs that her client's alibi is solid. Meanwhile, McGee grows suspicious of Tony's strange behaviour.

programme.title: NCIS: Gut Check

programme.desc: Sophia's latest boyfriend, Rocco, claims to have been involved in the mob. When the girls discover a bag of Rocco's with thousands of dollars in it, they assume he robbed a bank.

programme.desc: Rose's latest boyfriend has just retired and she is ready to spend a whole lot more time with him, but his retirement quickly turns him into a couch potato. Meanwhile, the girls deal with remodeling the garage into a guest room.

programme.title: Movie: A Summer Romance
programme.desc: A woman's ranch is her family's legacy, so, when a developer comes to town trying to buy it, she is not overly interested, that is, until he starts trying to win her trust, and her heart.

programme.title: Movie: How to Train Your Husband
programme.desc: Jillian's career as a marriage therapist is a great success, but for some reason her marriage isn't. When her husband goes on a trip, Jillian fosters a puppy and makes some changes for her husbands return.

programme.title: Movie: Just Add Romance
programme.desc: Two talented chefs, with very different cooking styles, are forced to work together on a cable cooking show. With a huge prize hanging in the balance, these two will have to sort out their chemistry both on screen, and off.

programme.title: The Office

programme.title: The Office: Beach Games
programme.desc: Michael is being considered for a job at corporate and has to recommend his replacement.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: In Plain View
programme.desc: Jane and the squad team up with another detective who believes they are both hunting for the same killer. Meanwhile, after discovering her identity has been stolen, Maura enlists the help of Angela to find the culprit.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bite Out of Crime
programme.desc: The squad puts in overtime on the hunt for a serial killer sniper. Maura makes friends with a witness to the crime but he has a mental condition that causes him to believe he is a wolf.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Family Matters
programme.desc: A woman finds her murdered husband and the investigation reveals the man may have been living a double life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Platform
programme.desc: When it appears one of their own shot an unarmed man on a busy Boston subway platform, the team must fight to find the real killer while clearing their detective's name. It becomes clear that the circumstances surrounding the shooting are not clear.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bassholes
programme.desc: Jane and Maura find themselves submerged in the cutthroat, high-stakes world of competitive bass fishing when a tournament-leading fisherman is killed. At the same time, Frankie is paying the price after losing a bet.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Imitation Game
programme.desc: The murder of a notorious thief sends Jane and Maura into the world of art heists and forgery, and forces Jane to tango with an FBI agent who has a keen interest in her case. There's also a new man in Angela's life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Your Health- Both Financial and Physical
programme.desc: How to save for the unexpected; how men can benefit from BioTE's Bioidentical Hormone Replacement Therapy; TruSculpt-Revolutionary non-surgical treatments; how to invest in gold and silver.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Into You Like a Train
programme.desc: As Meredith awaits a decision from Derek, her angst is interrupted when a train crash brings injured patients to the hospital. When Addison Shepherd notes Izzie's potential, Izzie must choose between professional gain and her friendship with Meredith.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Something to Talk About
programme.desc: Cristina, Izzie and Meredith pursue the case of Shane, a male patient who seems to have a hysterical pregnancy, which fascinates them and the entire medical staff. Elsewhere, a young patient inspires Alex to better express his feelings for Izzie.

programme.title: The Closer: Mom Duty
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson has to deal with an unexpected visit from her mother. Brenda's boyfriend, Agent Fritz Howard, was planning to move in, but will have to put their move on hold. An investigation becomes more complicated with each clue.

programme.title: The Closer: Slippin'
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson investigates the shooting of three youngsters. The shooting has all the marks of a gang related crime. Meanwhile Brenda must deal with her mother.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: After a bad batch of drugs claims the lives of two brothers, the race is on for the squad to find the dealer before more of their fellow high school students are threatened. Meanwhile, Rusty is feeling smothered by his new security detail.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Jailbait
programme.desc: When a newly released prisoner misses two back-to-back parole meetings, the squad is called in to track him down. Meanwhile, Sharon invites a therapist to the office to evaluate Rusty over a game of chess.

programme.title: Major Crimes: All In
programme.desc: When a body turns up at a posh country club in a quite neighbourhood, the squad's investigation leads them down a money trail full of surprises. Meanwhile, Flynn is noticeably distracted on the job and Rusty questions Emma's intentions.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Imitation Game
programme.desc: The murder of a notorious thief sends Jane and Maura into the world of art heists and forgery, and forces Jane to tango with an FBI agent who has a keen interest in her case. There's also a new man in Angela's life.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: The wife and two children of an Air Force captain are murdered in Fayetteville, North Carolina, and Army sergeant Tim Hennis is sentenced to death for the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Memory of Murder
programme.desc: A small-time Ohio drug dealer sits on death row for murdering a family, until a rookie attorney unearths long-hidden case records that shed new light on the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Murder in the Mansion
programme.desc: An IT entrepreneur in Keller, Texas is killed in a deadly home invasion, but the evidence on the scene and his widow's account of the attack aren't adding up.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Death of the Socialite
programme.desc: When an Atlanta socialite is gunned down in her foyer, the search for her murderer leads investigators across the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Three women a day are killed by a former or current husband or boyfriend. Nicole Beverly is desperately trying to avoid that fate. Chris Cuomo goes inside the epidemic of intimate partner violence that turns lethal for so many women.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: The Killer Twins
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo tries to find answers to the age-old question of nature versus nurture, asking if the desire to kill could be a genetic trait.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jennifer Asbenson tells Chris Cuomo her terrifying encounter with serial killer Andrew Urdiales. Even though she spent years telling people her story, not even her own mother believed her until Urdiales confessed to several other crimes.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo conducts the last interview serial killer Andrew Urdiales will ever give.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Sexual Predators
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo hears the firsthand accounts of rape survivors and examines what hurdles they face to get justice.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.title: Moonshiners: No Ordinary Run
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws unleash a 700-gallon run on a whisper-quiet steamer still. Mark and Huck traverse Appalachia's roughest terrain to run liquor with moonshine legend Jim Tom. Mike and Jerry engineer a high-tech solution to a backwoods problem.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Single Malt Moonshine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger's plan to employ an out of work friend backfires on payday. Tim invents a low-cost way to make his first single-malt moonshine. With their backwoods column still cranking out liquor, Mike discovers Jerry isn't carrying his own weight.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Overproof and Under the Gun
programme.desc: With bonus features: A high-flying Nashville customer has Mark and Digger trying an oatmeal raisin shine. Mike and Jerry are under the gun when they overdeliver on proof to a biker gang. Mark and Huck forge a lifeline to old-time mountain shiners.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Too Much of a Good Thing
programme.desc: As Tickle and the Laws start a massive rye run, a mysterious tip results in too much of a good thing. Jerry gets rushed to the hospital and Mike finds himself shorthanded. Tim comes up with a recipe for a first ever single malt moonshine.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Patrol and Protect: Garage Gator
programme.desc: In Liberty County, Game Warden Jake Noxon investigates a family for illegally keeping a pet deer, and farther south an alligator roams a garage. Game Warden Mike Boone joins forces with local police to track down armed suspects after a robbery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Gone A-Rye
programme.desc: Shiners attempt to stay off the grid as the outside world encroaches on the backwoods. Tim breaks the news about the fate of Climax Moonshine. Jeff, Mark and Lance search for a new site before rivals can grab hold of the market.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Too Much of a Good Thing
programme.desc: As Tickle and the Laws start a massive rye run, a mysterious tip results in too much of a good thing. Jerry gets rushed to the hospital and Mike finds himself shorthanded. Tim comes up with a recipe for a first ever single malt moonshine.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Patrol and Protect: Garage Gator
programme.desc: In Liberty County, Game Warden Jake Noxon investigates a family for illegally keeping a pet deer, and farther south an alligator roams a garage. Game Warden Mike Boone joins forces with local police to track down armed suspects after a robbery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Gone A-Rye
programme.desc: Shiners attempt to stay off the grid as the outside world encroaches on the backwoods. Tim breaks the news about the fate of Climax Moonshine. Jeff, Mark and Lance search for a new site before rivals can grab hold of the market.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Tempers get hot when survival tactics collide as Joe and Cody struggle to escape the Nicaraguan jungle.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Frying Pan
programme.desc: Deep in New Mexico's Chihuahuan Desert, Joe struggles to get out of an abandoned mineshaft.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Mars on Earth
programme.desc: Two guys with two completely opposing approaches to survival take on one of the most barren landscapes on the planet, Chile's Atacama Desert.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Duane Ollinger believes there's a fortune of gold buried beneath his property in Utah, Blind Frog Ranch. But even though the land seems to be fighting him at every turn, he's not going to stop until he gets his hands on the gold, whatever the cost.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Submerged Treasure
programme.desc: With an access tunnel to the underground cavern finally opened, and a tantalizing clue discovered, Duane's son Chad takes a risky dive into the flooded cave system, and what he finds defies all explanation.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Spies in the Night
programme.desc: Repo mastermind Mike Kennedy braves a potential suicide mission in California's Central Valley in pursuit of big bucks. Kevin Lacey finds himself, and his 25K payday, at the mercy of a vengeful mechanic and a windy, Colorado night.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Narrow Escape
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy braves gators in the Florida night to snatch a party boy's Cessna Float plane. Kevin Lacy enrols a vengeful divorcé for a high-altitude, high-risk heist in Colorado and Ken and Danny have a close encounter with an angry debtor's shovel.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Undercover and Out of Time
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy teams up in Southern California to snatch a plane in broad daylight, Kevin Lacey poses as a Cajun pilot to heist a $2-million prize and Ken Cage finds himself facing high winds and the threat of F-16s to make his payday.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Alone in Alaska
programme.desc: Adrenalin junkie Mike Kennedy boldly sets out into the remote Alaskan wilderness, braving wolf country and bitter temperatures, in a hunt for a Piper Super Cub.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Collision
programme.desc: Extreme turbulence over the Teton Range threatens disaster for Mike Kennedy, but a second crack at a $3-million Citation V offers Ken Cage and Danny Thompson a shot at redemption.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Rescue Repo
programme.desc: Super Repo Man Mike Kennedy boldly risks an emergency landing on a remote Alaskan glacier, while strongman Danny Thompson frees a $1.8-million Lear 31 from its hangar by hand.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: Unpolished: All Shook Up
programme.desc: Lexi finally spills what's been bothering her about Matt all of these years, and a divide forms in the family. Bria and Matt isolate themselves while Lexi throws herself into work with a 3-D nail build that challenges her skills.

programme.title: Unpolished: Come Home to Daddy
programme.desc: Lexi's creativity is pushed to the limit for her latest client's nails, but problems with technology threaten to make her experiment a failure. Bria and Matt arrive in Las Vegas to elope and the rest of the family slowly catches wind of their plan.

programme.title: Unpolished: Catch Up Special
programme.desc: Long Island nail artist Lexi Martone shares everything that happened with her family and their salon last season. From wild nail requests to a marriage proposal and the resurfacing of an explosive family secret, it was quite a year for the Martones.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: What's Cooking, Good Looking?
programme.desc: Trent and Amber meet with an intimacy coach to spice things up, and a cooking competition inspires Alex to improve his culinary skills. Jonah's girlfriend Ashley visits from Asheville, and Anna teaches new tricks to her main man -- the family dog Cruiser.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Did Somebody Shrink You?
programme.desc: Trent and Amber surprise Emma and Alex with a go kart so that they can practice driving. Meanwhile, Elizabeth is making big strides in her nursing career, but she is not happy to see her younger siblings behind the wheel before she has her own license.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: A Big Fat Ultimatum
programme.desc: With Chase long gone and Buddy on the fence about staying with her, Whitney considers packing it all in and heading home to Greensboro. When Ryan finds out, however, he throws down a pretty hefty ultimatum, threatening her to stay in Charlotte -- or else!

programme.title: Unpolished: A New Beginning
programme.desc: A devastating loss hits the Martone family at its core as sisters Lexi and Bria and their mother Jennifer work together to reopen the salon after being closed due to the pandemic.

programme.desc: Buddy brings his new girlfriend to Greensboro but struggles to find them a place to live. Whitney is shocked when Todd quits BGDC. Babs and Glenn set Whitney up on a blind date. Whitney is fat shamed when the RV is vandalized in front of her home.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Big Girls Don't Cry
programme.desc: After an impossible rock wall climb, Whitney is forced to rethink her Alaskan adventure. Tensions finally boil over when Todd gives Whitney a mouthful for spreading lies about him quitting BGDC. Buddy worries that his new girlfriend will leave him.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Queen for the Day
programme.desc: Nicole leaves her six-month-old quadruplets at home while she shops for a gown for her destination wedding. Margo, who lost all her hair due to cancer treatments, comes to the salon to find the perfect dress that makes her feel beautiful inside and out.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Blowout Sale

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Picky Brides

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Grands Know Best
programme.desc: Desiree shops for her dress with her family, including her 90-year-old Grandma.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Whitney's Long-Distance Relationship

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Slipping Through My Fingers

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: The Facts of Life

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Dominic's Story

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Below the Belt
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q put their sword wielding skills to the test while teaching fencing, and one joker is especially 'en garde' when he faces an Olympian. Plus, the guys trim away their dignity while posing as fabulous hairstylists at a salon.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bathroom Break
programme.desc: Find out how many laser nipples one man can stand and who the sexy fireman who 'rescues' Sal from the bathroom of horrors really is.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Dream Crusher
programme.desc: The guys try to kiss unsuspecting strangers until a special guest crashes the party, they focus-group their absurd life stories as potential movies, and the big loser gets a room-full of enemies while judging a kids' talent show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Doomed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr take in more than they bargained for while working at a tailor shop, then convince strangers to hand over their cell phones. Plus, tonight's big loser sacrifices his childhood for a punishment three months in the making.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Taunted House
programme.desc: The guys get extra cheesy at a pizza parlor, and then head to Wall Street where they ask strangers to help translate bizarre text messages in Spanish. Then, trapped in a haunted house, a nightmare comes to life for tonight's big loser.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Good, the Bad, and the Punished
programme.desc: One Joker committed a misdemeanor while posing as a crabby cabbie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Universal Appeal
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe invade Orlando. The guys are out of line managing a ride at a theme park, get all wet on a river adventure, and man the (mis)information booth. Plus, tonight's loser goes from spider hero to barnyard zero.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q say aloha from Hawaii. Tonight, see why it's blood in the water for tonight's big loser, who swims with the fishes after too many fails.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Spaghetti and Meatballs Episode
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Steak and Potatoes Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.desc: Michael delivers a shock at a shipping store when wine tips over and gets bubble wrap tipsy. Then, at a popcorn shop, he dons the latest kernel fashions, and at a theater he stuns his helper with a trick that jumps off the screen.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Industrial Asphalt Sealant
programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it. A man can vanish into a manhole, and maybe even a manhole can vanish itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Incredibly Unsettling
programme.desc: At a health store in Chicago, Michael proves you are what you drink, and later at a Metro station, he utterly derails a commuter's sense of reality.

programme.desc: To celebrate her husband Nick's birthday, Molly Yeh surprises him by making his favourite Mexican cuisine- with a Midwestern twist of course! She cooks up a taco hotdish, chili-lime fruit salad and ham and cheese jalapeno poppers.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Norwegian Celebration
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is cooking for a Norwegian dinner celebration on the farm, starting with Lefse hot dogs with fennel slaw and open face salmon and avocado sandwiches. She also makes crispy paprika fries with dill mayo and a stunning Norwegian wreath cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Anniversary
programme.desc: It's Ree Drummond and her husband Ladd's anniversary, so to celebrate she's cooking a meal for the whole family. She prepares an Elway's wedge salad, prime rib for five and squaw bread with honey butter.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All Grown Up

programme.desc: Ree makes spicy stewed beef, pimento cheese and bacon grits, roasted broccoli salad and a sour cream and parsley dressing.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna
programme.desc: It's fiesta time as pool designer Lucas Congdon and his crew are challenged to create a Mexican resort in a Venice, Florida residential backyard. Lucas encounters several design 'firsts' on his journey to infuse the flavors of Mexico into his creation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Zen and the Art of Pools
programme.desc: Lucas takes his art of backyard transformations to Parrish, FL, where a couple requests the ultimate space of tranquility and relaxation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Deeper Dive: Big Pool Dreams
programme.desc: In Florida, Lucas transforms a small yard into an oasis and finally makes a dedicated caregiver's dream a reality. Later, he is tasked with a challenging project and builds an ocean-themed pool, with his first-ever water couch.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Builds: Intergalactic Spy Hideaway

programme.desc: Investigators arrive at abandoned property to rescue some horses, but are surprised to discover a litter of puppies trapped inside a storm drain. An amateur snake collector has several large, aggressive and dangerous snakes roaming free in her house.

programme.desc: An SPCA team deals with a report of a dead puppy in a back yard.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell: If Something Happens to Me
programme.desc: A young mother in Utah vanishes and the only suspect, her husband, acts suspiciously. Stephanie Bauer examines never-before-seen home video recordings that shed light on the dramatic events surrounding the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell: A Family Affair
programme.desc: A defensive husband fleeing justice after the disappearance of his wife drags both of their families down deeper into destruction and tragedy. Stephanie Bauer brings new insight to the decade-old case of the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.title: A Love to Kill For: Gypsy Rose & Nick
The Piketon Family Murders
programme.desc: In rural Piketon, Ohio a family of 8 is murdered execution style across four different properties. As police investigate the attack, word of the brutal murders sends shockwaves through the community and destroys the lives of two families.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Bloody New Years
programme.desc: Just before New Years, a hockey mom is gunned down at her front door. Later that night, seven more bodies are found in another suburban home. Police discover a shocking connection between the two crimes as they track down the killer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: New Year's Evil
programme.desc: New Year's in a tiny town, Joanna and Carl Dutcher ring in the year with their grandson. Days later, they are found violently killed. The hunt for the killer leads police to a sinister group that threatens the entire community.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Rampage
programme.desc: Two days after Christmas a mass shooting terrorizes a small town. After killing two people and wounding many more the gunman is taken into custody. When police search for answers they uncover the worst family massacre in US history.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Who Killed Little Mama?
programme.desc: When an elderly, free spirit comes into a large sum of money she is mercilessly attacked to within an inch of her life. Investigators uncover a twisted trail of addiction, brutality and betrayal with a surprise killer in plain sight.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: The Kill Club
programme.desc: A beloved member of the local community is brutally murdered with part of his body apparently taken as a souvenir by the killer. Detectives try to make sense of this horrifying crime despite conflicting stories and a possible false confession.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Two Fires, One Victim
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is found burning in the woods just off the side of the road, investigators are left wondering not only who she is, but who could have done this to her. They follow a trail of fire, fury, and falsities to get to the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Chris Watts: Confession Untold
programme.desc: Investigators speak for the first time on one of the most baffling cases they've encountered, exposing the devastating truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of seemingly devoted husband and father, Chris Watts.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Vampire Clan
programme.desc: 17-year-old Jennifer Wendorf comes home to find her parents brutally murdered and sister missing. Searching for answers, investigators discover a complicated web tracing back to a cult of self-proclaimed vampires.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Palo Mayombe
programme.desc: After crossing the Mexican Border from Brownsville, Texas, a student out on spring break goes missing. The investigation leads US officials to a cult known for practicing witchcraft led by a former male model and a high school cheerleader.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder: Divided By Love
programme.desc: A teenaged Romeo and Juliet defy family differences to marry and have a baby boy, but their joy is shattered when violence rips the family apart. Decades pass before the cold case finally gets a lead that reveals deep family secrets and a web of lies.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder: Love Me and Never Leave
programme.desc: A dental student rejects her boyfriend's marriage proposal and shortly after a mysterious death that stuns everyone. When another victim dies in similar circumstances 14 years later, investigators must determine if both cases are fatally intertwined.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder: An Engagement and a Murder
programme.desc: Eight days before the wedding of their dreams, a couple's plans are derailed by a brutal murder. A detailed investigation unravels a murder for hire plot that leads them to suspect a member of the wedding party.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Who Killed Little Mama?

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge's Son Poisoning
programme.desc: Observing that Marge is lonely, Bart offers to spend time with her. After they go on tandem bike rides and decorate Bart's treehouse, the bullies from school dub Bart a mama's boy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: See Homer Run
programme.desc: Homer's inability to embrace Lisa's Father's Day book the same way he does Bart's Father's Day Toolman causes Lisa to develop DDD (Disappointed Daughter Disorder). In the meantime, Bart causes a huge car pile-up when he steals a street sign.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last of the Red Hat Mamas
programme.desc: Homer has an altercation with the Easter Bunny at the mayor's egg hunt, causing Marge to be shunned. Marge decides to join a woman's group called The Cheery Red Tomatoes, and agrees to help with an upcoming charity drive.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Italian Bob
programme.desc: After Mr. Burns crashes his Stutz Bearcat, he sends Homer and the family off to Italy to pick up his new fancy sports car. While on their adventure, the Simpsons end up stranded in a village where a rehabilitated Sideshow Bob reigns as mayor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons Christmas Stories
programme.desc: The Simpsons deliver holiday cheer in this Christmas-themed trilogy. Homer takes over the sermon and delivers his version of the birth of Christ. Grandpa reminisces about his daredevil days as a fighter pilot. The townspeople prepare for Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Simpsons: We're on the Road to D'Ohwhere
programme.desc: After Bart steals a key from Principal Skinner's office and gets himself into hot water, Marge and Homer send him to a behaviour modification camp.

programme.title: Family Guy: Coma Guy

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Now We're Not Cooking With Gas
programme.desc: Bob is determined to do whatever it takes to cook a rare, heritage turkey after the gas goes out on Thanksgiving.

programme.desc: The Columbus Zoo and Aquarium makes room for three adorable new cheetah cubs.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Penguin's New 'Do
programme.desc: A penguin stuck in molt for a year has hopefully seen the last of his bad hair days.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Welcome to the Family
programme.desc: The staff at the Columbus Zoo can hardly contain themselves as they prepare to make a home for an orphaned baby gorilla.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Lost Skyscrapers
programme.desc: A ground-breaking experiment reveals how ancient Egyptians built the giant obelisks of Thebes, and new discoveries at this holy site could explain why these mysterious marvels triggered the downfall of the pharaohs and the end of Egypt's golden age.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Special sneak peek of the new season of Mysteries of the Abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Strangest Pyramids of Egypt
programme.desc: Curiously constructed pyramids of ancient Egypt contain mysteries that continue to baffle archaeologists today; using the latest imaging technology and advanced scientific methods, experts decode the secrets behind these strange and unexplored ruins.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
programme.desc: The Nazca Lines in Peru are mysterious giant symbols; hundreds of alien looking drawings created more than 1000 years ago. Learn why their creators made vast images in the desert that only make sense from the air.

programme.title: Unearthed: Strangest Pyramids of Egypt
programme.desc: Curiously constructed pyramids of ancient Egypt contain mysteries that continue to baffle archaeologists today; using the latest imaging technology and advanced scientific methods, experts decode the secrets behind these strange and unexplored ruins.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
programme.desc: The Nazca Lines in Peru are mysterious giant symbols; hundreds of alien looking drawings created more than 1000 years ago. Learn why their creators made vast images in the desert that only make sense from the air.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Dragon's Inferno
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal hard evidence showing that dragons were not just the stuff of nightmares, and experts use the latest science to explain why people believed in these wicked creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Kraken Awakens
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom
programme.desc: Mike Barratt, an astronaut with NASA, explains the strange rings on the world's oldest lake that were photographed from the International Space Station. Since then, more rings have been seen and they continue to baffle scientists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Fleet of Cannibal Bay
programme.desc: See a fleet of sunken ships that point to ghosts, cannibals, and bloodshed in early America; strange Arctic holes that NASA can't explain; and near Area 51, mysterious alien structures straight out of Star Wars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Americas' Lost Romans
programme.desc: The remains of an abandoned settlement high in the mountains of Peru could be an ancient Roman village, leaving experts to speculate if the Romans visited the Americas centuries before Columbus; if so, it could point to long-lost gold.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Madness on the Lake
programme.desc: The remote lakeside town of Bayview, Idaho is a little too quiet for local resident Larry Cragun, and soon the isolation gets to him.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Welcome to the Devil House
programme.desc: A mansion deep in the Georgia woods is said to house terrible secrets. Everyone in this rural county has heard the rumors, but no one knows the truth ... until a 1982 visit to Corpsewood Manor by a group of young locals turns deadly.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Married couple Doug and Rozina Anderson's decision to take a long weekend in the peaceful woods of Northern California turns out to be a fateful mistake.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Secrets of the Santa Cruz Mountains
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Linda Jozavich vanishes from work one night in 1979, it just doesn't make sense to her Santa Cruz community. Years later, the murder of another local teen, Lois Sigala, sends investigators a step closer to solving Linda's case.

programme.title: Dead Silent: All the Lights Were on
programme.desc: After getting engaged, Nikki Ansley takes a job at a local convenience store in order to pay for her upcoming nuptials. But her best-laid plans are horrifically derailed when two unwelcome customers show up right before closing time.

programme.title: Dead Silent: His Blue Light
programme.desc: In the mid-to-late 1990s, a sexual predator police dub 'The Blue Light Rapist' goes on a serial attack spree across Arkansas. As authorities scramble to stop him in his tracks, he sets his sights on seventeen-year-old Shannon Woods.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ozark Enchantment
programme.desc: Trying to make her way in the Ozarks, Joy Dishneau set her sights on becoming a small business owner. But when she is found murdered in her own shop, all of her employees become suspects.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Dead Silent: His Blue Light
programme.desc: In the mid-to-late 1990s, a sexual predator police dub 'The Blue Light Rapist' goes on a serial attack spree across Arkansas. As authorities scramble to stop him in his tracks, he sets his sights on seventeen-year-old Shannon Woods.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ozark Enchantment
programme.desc: Trying to make her way in the Ozarks, Joy Dishneau set her sights on becoming a small business owner. But when she is found murdered in her own shop, all of her employees become suspects.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Bad for Business
programme.desc: Successful business owner MaryAnn Clibbery is brutally murdered at the remodeling business she owned in Loves Park, Illinois. The murder shocks the town. Then a suspicious bag found floating on the ice in the river unlocks the mystery of her slaying.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Open 24 Hours
programme.desc: To pay for college, Donna Ferres takes a job working the overnight shift at a local convenience store. But after a familiar face walks into the store one night, her routine shift takes a sick and twisted turn.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: Karma Comes Late
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered and dumped in an alley. Police have plenty of suspects, including her former beau, but the trail soon runs cold. Years later, a ghost from the past suddenly reappears, giving the family renewed hope for justice.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: A Son's Last Kiss
programme.desc: Drew Cato breaks up with his lover and disappears soon after. Police scour the area to no avail, but the plot thickens when they interview his son's mom. As the search drags on, Drew's secrets come to light -- and one of them proves to be deadly.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Apartment 23
programme.desc: With graduation nearing at Northeastern University, students are alarmed at the discovery of a fellow co-ed shot to death in her apartment. Detectives face many challenges in the investigation until they realize the answer is right in front of them.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: The New England chills of the New Year bite even more brutally when a mother and daughter are savagely murdered in their Woburn, MA home. With several suspects on the line, detectives take a shot in the dark in order to solve this nightmare of a mystery.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: When beautiful young mother Danielle Jennings is found strangled to death in her apartment, detectives immediately believe she knew her attacker -- until a witness comes forward with a ringer of a clue that leads them to an unthinkable monster.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Cult of Personality
programme.desc: In 2014 a 911 call reports gunshots at the home of TV host Scott Rogers. As detectives work to piece together the events that led up to what looks like a murder-suicide, they soon discover a trail of lies from England all the way to Louisiana.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Warning Signs
programme.desc: A Deputy reports a 1990 Dodge Intrepid pushed over an embankment just south of Gig Harbor, Washington. He investigates and discovers the dead body of missing Puyallup father, Randall Ferguson, in the trunk. He had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: On March 21st 2011, a fire burned down a parsonage behind a church and a Pastor loses his wife. Once the fire had settled a fire marshal investigated the site and discovered that there was more to the story than an accidental fire.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Before Vegas
programme.desc: August 7, 2000, Casey Tiner and her boyfriend TJ Steele disappear. At first, people believe they ran away. But as time passes and the young couple never reappear, their families and the police realize someone is lying.

programme.title: See No Evil: Mr. Reed Will See You
programme.desc: Keith Reed is found gunned down on his doorstep. What seems like a possible crime of passion is turned on its head after a surprise discovery. Surveillance footage helps police unravel the mystery behind Keith's death and just who killed him.

programme.title: See No Evil: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Police investigate the strange disappearance of a reporter in Pensacola, FL who was involved in the world of gaming, and a mother disappears across state. Cameras shed light on these two cases.

programme.title: See No Evil: Watch Me Disappear
programme.desc: Sian O'Callaghan disappears after a night out in Swindon, UK. With the clock ticking, Detectives pull hours of surveillance footage from the area, until they hit gold: footage of her getting into a taxi. Now the race is on to ID the vehicle and driver.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Israel
programme.desc: Travel to the Middle East to uncover the very latest weapons being designed for the Israel Defence Forces.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs but when his brother David realized who was the Unabomber, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliffside retreat for a family wanting to reconnect in the Sierra Nevada Mountains. But for Gregg and his team, building in the middle of nowhere presents its challenges.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Spearfish Canyon
programme.desc: Deep in the backwoods of Spearfish Canyon, South Dakota's premier off-grid builder Jared Capp sets out to turn four shipping containers into a stunning two-storey mountain hideaway.

programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Nelson House
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew saves pieces of a house in Mt. Jackson, VA. Their main focus is on the clay-fired roof and on the oversized cornice bracket.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving the Cabin That Saved the Company
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work to salvage a cabin that saved their business. It takes a variety of repairs to bring it back to life, but once it's up, Katherine has the best surprise of all. Later, Mark's pal Eddie makes a lamp out of reclaimed materials.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Beam Cabin: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This is the whole story of how a boneyard experiment helped a community rise from the ashes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Biggest Barn Ever
programme.desc: In Texas, the Barnwood Builders raise the largest timberframe they have ever built by combining wood and steel. Along the way, they battle hundred degree temperatures, and Mark explores a renovated inn with the Junk Gypsies.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Ohio Hay Barn: The Whole Story
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders save a huge hay barn in Pleasantville, Ohio, shipping it to Cave Spring, Georgia, where they rebuild it into a home.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Women Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking salutes the country's most impressive and creative female pitmasters, learning a few new roasting methods along the way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Mania
programme.desc: It's a carnivore extravagance as Roger Mooking visits pitmasters cooking meat in massive quantities.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pig Out
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is going hog wild for the most insane pig roasts in the country.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: San Antonio
programme.desc: Strongman Eddie hits San Antonio to sample the finest Tex-Mex food and a gigantic chicken fried steak.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Miami
programme.desc: In Miami, Eddie Hall's first stop is a seafood spot for a fresh fried-fish sandwich. Then, Eddie sets his sights at a shooting range before heading to Anna Maria Island, FL, to take on a monster dish of rib-eye steak, pork ribs, lobster and shrimp.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Fargo, ND
programme.desc: Casey’s eating adventure takes him to Fargo, North Dakota for a hearty European take on a cheesy classic, a breakfast-dessert mash up, and the Boiler Room’s Hot Dish Challenge – a massive Midwestern meal made for the entire family…or just one man.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Denver
programme.desc: Adam visits the Mile-High City for burgers with enough toppings to fill a dartboard, some Rocky Mountain oysters, and a showdown with the biggest burrito in the West.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets things started in Boston where a whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection, a salt crust and a foil wrap for crispy skin. Then in Phoenix, a wolf of a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Savannah, where fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles. In Seattle, a burger with a house-made chorizo patty brings serious Spanish flavor to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Triple Meat Trifecta
programme.desc: In Newport, R.I., Michael Symon dives into a triple meat-stacked sandwich with smoked pork belly, bologna and chicken liver pate. A decadent, ultra-crispy and deep-fried soft-shell crab patty in San Francisco will change the way you look at burgers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Bronx

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phoenix
