programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Mystery
programme.desc: Kansas City Mickey sets out to find an ancient mouse-eared stone monument deep in the Hidden Jungle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Mooo-sical
programme.desc: Everyone is excited because Clarabelle is putting on a musical about nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Goes Goofy
programme.desc: Goofy gets cloned after getting sprayed by Prof. Von Drake's latest experimental goo.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Mystery
programme.desc: When Minnie's freshly baked muffins disappear the gang set out to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Chuggington: Out In The Cold / The Old Fashioned Way
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Space Captain Donald
programme.desc: When Pluto's bouncy ball bounces all the way into outer space, Mickey and our friends, led by Space Captain Donald, take a trip to the Moon to retrieve the ball.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Frozen Giganto/ Dinosia
programme.desc: Bill wishes Giganto would go away forever after his coconut lunch is disrupted. Ayati sends the four friends off on a quest to find a legendary land call Dinosia.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: There Goes Our Fun! / Don't Wake the Baby!
programme.desc: Mickey invites everyone to join him for Mickey Day at the amusement park. The Happy Helpers babysit the Matisses' new baby boy, Ollie.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Octobella's Garden / Sploshy Splash
programme.desc: Three friends turn into superheroes at night when they put on their pyjamas.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: Vampirina: Bat to the Future / Gregoria Gets Down!
programme.desc: Esmeralda leaver her crystal ball at the B&B; Vee and Demi find Gregoria practicing for a dance competition.

programme.title: Toon Bops: Miranda the Panda and Mark the Shark
Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Don't Rain on My Pug-rade/ Their Royal Pug-ness
programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Smiley-est Shark/ The Super Duper Brother
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Rock-A-Bye Birdie/ The Fly-Along
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Professor Pancake/ You Crack Me Up
programme.desc: While Doc and her toys are cleaning up her room, Doc finds Professor Hootsburgh trapped under her toy box!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Substitute Teacher
programme.desc: When a suspicious new student shows up at school, Charlotte and Henry think he may be up to something. Captain Man goes undercover as a substitute teacher to learn more.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Space Rock
programme.desc: Henry brings home a piece of his superhero life when a piece of rock from outer space is more than it seems.

programme.title: The Thundermans: On the Straight and Arrow
programme.desc: Cherry asks Max to use his superpowers to help her get her driver's license, but Phoebe's jealously of their new bond threatens her relationship with her best friend.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Phoebe vs. Max: The Sequel
programme.desc: Phoebe's first assignment as a superhero is to protect Hiddenville, which proves too easy until she challenges Max to inject some mischief into their sleepy hometown.

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 3
programme.desc: Tension on the ship rises as Elliott plants seeds of distrust about Will, whom Elliott suspects is collecting mission information for his reporter mother. Meanwhile, Samy works with Matilda’s inventor to probe the AI’s role in the accidental launch.

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 21
programme.desc: After a small toy clogs the toilet and leaves only one working bathroom, the kids band together on a chaotic mission to dislodge the toy. On Earth, tempers flare between the parents while Matilda’s inventor devises a bold plan to hijack the AI.

programme.title: Danger Force: Crush
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Young Dylan: The Enforcer
programme.desc: On his first day at school, Dylan starts a classroom protest over having to wear uniforms.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Just Desserts/ You Doo
programme.desc: After wishing that all the food in the world were desserts, Timmy helps himself to all the sweets. There is a magic doll that only fairies can make which can give you the power to make other people do whatever you tell them.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Lame Ducks/ Perfect Nightmare
programme.desc: Dad organizes a neighbourhood watch program to catch a thief. Timmy wishes he had the perfect family in order to win a contest. Everyone goes crazy trying to be perfect.

programme.title: The Loud House: Making the Grade/ Vantastic Voyage
programme.desc: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake. Sick of their family van always falling apart, the kids decide to try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

programme.title: The Loud House: Patching Things Up/ Cheater by the Dozen
programme.desc: Lola and Lana try out for Bluebell Scouts but discover one of them might be more suited for it. When Lincoln and Clyde think Bobby is cheating on Lori they follow him around town gathering evidence.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lock 'N Loud/ The Whole Picture
programme.desc: Dad gets upset with the kids for never locking the front door; Lincoln accidentally erases his childhood photos.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Such Luck/ Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne finds out Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder and gets him to teach her some moves. And, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business to buy a new skateboard.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kick the Bucket List/ Party Down
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are jeopardized when they only have one day to complete their list. Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests don't like what she's planned.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Man Ray Returns/ Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation. Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whirlybrains/ MermaidPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad of flying your own brain like a tiny drone. When SpongeBob and Patrick play Mermaidman and Barnacleboy, it's all fun and games until their sworn enemies arrive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Back to the Past / The Bad Guy Club for Villains
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick travel back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. The pair enjoy a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: It's Pony: Gerry's Tour/ Loud Horse
programme.desc: Annie and Pony try to help Gerry pass the test to become a museum tour guide. When a noisy neighbor drives Annie to the brink, she and Pony have to find a way to quiet her down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Secret Box/ Band Geeks
programme.desc: Pat has a secret box that drives SpongeBob crazy; Squid recruits SpongeBob for his band.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Buried in Time
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward are accidentally locked in Bikini Bottom's first time capsule.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sailor Mouth/ Artist Unknown
programme.desc: Bob learns a 'bad' word off of a dumpster; Bob is Squid's only student for an art class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Main Drain/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick search for a legendary drain on the ocean floor. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whatever Happened to SpongeBob
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to spend time with his friends but he ends up being a nuisance to everyone instead. They all tell him to go away, so with a heavy heart, he does just that.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Great Patty Caper
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Blue Angel/ Marked Man

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Ain't No Business Like Show Business

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Six Degrees of Graduation

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Where There's a Will There's a Way

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Where There's a Will There's a Way

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: All Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: Will regrets dropping philosophy and tries to convince the professor to let him back in.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: The Bowling Show
programme.desc: It's a bowling fight to the death as Michael is pitted against his arch enemy, Stu Tyler.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Jr. Gets His License

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Anniversary

programme.desc: Michael discovers that taking the family to Hawaii is not without trials and tribulations.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Hearts and Flowers
programme.desc: Dee thinks that Pops loves her and Shawn is dateless for his own Valentine's Day party.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: The Ghetto Gourmets
programme.desc: Shawn and Marlon help Pops host a television cooking show.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: A woman is a final contestant on a dating show and faces off against her high-school sweetheart during the 'Hometown Date.'

programme.title: Movie: June in January
programme.desc: Every January, June goes through post-holiday blues and Alex surprises her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: My Brother My Father
programme.desc: Sophia's brother, Angelo, a priest, is coming to Miami for a visit and he doesn't know Dorothy and Stan are divorced. So in order to spare his feelings, Sophia convinces Dorothy and Stan to pretend to be married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments
programme.desc: The girls begin to panic when Sophia says she's moving out to go live with her son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments
programme.desc: The girls begin to panic when Sophia says she's moving out to go live with her son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Ma Makes Three
programme.desc: Feeling sorry for a lonely Sophia, Dorothy allows her to come along on a date with her and Dorothy's latest beau. However, pretty soon Sophia begins tagging along on every date which puts a rift in Dorothy's romantic plans.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Larceny and Old Lace
programme.desc: Sophia's latest boyfriend, Rocco, claims to have been involved in the mob. When the girls discover a bag of Rocco's with thousands of dollars in it, they assume he robbed a bank.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose's Big Adventure
programme.desc: Rose's latest boyfriend has just retired and she is ready to spend a whole lot more time with him, but his retirement quickly turns him into a couch potato. Meanwhile, the girls deal with remodeling the garage into a guest room.

programme.title: Frasier: Where There's Smoke There's Fired
programme.desc: The station owner's new manager, millionaire Big Willy, asks Frasier to get his fiancée to stop smoking. Frasier agrees, until he discovers that the fiancée is his agent, Bebe.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Loves Roz
programme.desc: When Roz decides to date one of Niles' patients, Frasier tries to find a way to warn Roz without breaching his ethical obligation for confidentiality. Roz soon mistakes his attempts to warn her for subtle declarations of yearning.

programme.title: Frasier: The Focus Group
programme.desc: Frasier is puzzled when a single member of a focus group dislikes his radio show. Frasier's quest to understand why becomes an obsession and he inadvertently ruins the man's life.

programme.title: Frasier: You Can Go Home Again
programme.desc: To celebrate Frasier's third anniversary at the radio station, Roz gives Frasier a copy of his first broadcast. As he listens, Frasier remembers the events that occurred when he first arrived in Seattle and reunited with his family.

programme.title: Frasier: The Two Mrs. Cranes
programme.desc: When Daphne's ex-fiancé comes to visit, she quickly introduces him to her 'new husband,' Niles. Martin stirs up trouble when he decides to introduce Roz as Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: Love Bites the Dog
programme.desc: Roz sets Frasier up with a gorgeous woman, who takes a shine to Bulldog instead. But when she dumps him, Bulldog becomes so distraught that Frasier has to take over his show. Meanwhile, Niles places an ad to attract more patients.

programme.title: Frasier: The Impossible Dream
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles struggle to interpret Frasier's recurring dream, in which Frasier finds himself in bed with the radio station's restaurant critic.

programme.title: Frasier: A Crane's Critique
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are ecstatic when Martin becomes good friends with a reclusive author. Trouble ensues when they discover the author's new manuscript.

programme.title: Reba: Cookies for Santa
programme.desc: Reba is disappointed when she learns that she will be spending Christmas Eve alone.

programme.title: Reba: A Moment in Time
programme.desc: Feelings are hurt when the Harts create a video time capsule for Elizabeth.

programme.title: Reba: The Rings
programme.desc: Brock is upset when Reba tries to sell her engagement ring online.

programme.title: Reba: The Vasectomy
programme.desc: Reba and Barbara Jean are furious when Brock reveals he had a vasectomy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mister Terrific
programme.desc: Rose begins to date 'Mr. Terrific', a kiddie show host, who gets fired when Dorothy gets a part-time job as a consultant on the show, a job he helped her get.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mother's Day
programme.desc: While waiting for phone calls from their children wishing them a happy Mother's Day, the girls reminisce about past Mother's Days.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Yes, We Have No Havanas
programme.desc: Blanche's latest boyfriend is a charming Cuban who sweeps her off her feet, but she's not the only one when Blanche discovers he's been dating Sophia behind her back.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Days and Nights of Sophia Petrillo
programme.desc: Sophia organizes a band to raise money, volunteers at the hospital and battles return policies at the supermarket.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Blanche is determined to sleep with the one man who has refused her once in the past. Meanwhile, Rose claims to have seen a UFO and gets the Air Force involved.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Yokel Hero
programme.desc: Rose vies for St. Olaf's award for the Woman of the Year.

programme.title: Movie: Hearts of Winter
programme.desc: An interior designer brings new life to the house of a widower and his daughter and finds love in the process.

programme.title: Movie: My Boyfriend's Back: Wedding March 5
programme.desc: An up-and-coming wedding planner takes on a partner to help launch her new company. What she doesn't know, is that the best-man from her first job is none other than her own ex-boyfriend who she hasn't seen in years.

programme.title: Movie: Fashionably Yours
programme.desc: A woman decides to move home after years of organizing fashion shows. Her mover decides to show her how beautiful her new home is, leading to an unexpected romance for both of them.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?
programme.desc: The boys become obsessed with religion and redemption after they're scared by a sermon about Hell. Meanwhile, Saddam returns to Hell and tries to have Satan's new boyfriend 'taken care of.'

programme.title: South Park: Probably
programme.desc: When their church's answers aren't sufficient to sate the boys' fear, they break off from their church and Cartman takes on the role of evangelical preacher. Meanwhile in Hell, the feud between Chris and Saddam continues.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of the Fellowship of the Ring to the Two Towers
programme.desc: The boys embark upon a mythical quest as they set out to return their copy of the 'The Lord of the Rings' movie to the Two Towers video store. Unknown to them, they are really carrying the most degraded porno ever made.

programme.title: South Park: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: The boys must embrace the latest fad to hit South Park Elementary or risk their status as the coolest kids in school.

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The kids desperately want to bring an end to the boring baseball season. The problem is, they keep winning.

programme.title: South Park: Crack Baby Athletic Association
programme.desc: Kyle gets in on the ground floor of Cartman's new business venture, The Crack Baby Athletic Association.

programme.title: South Park: Poor and Stupid
programme.desc: Cartman dreams of becoming a NASCAR driver and he's willing to do whatever it takes to make it happen, even if that means giving up all of his toys and money.

programme.title: South Park: Go Fund Yourself
programme.desc: The boys name their new start-up company 'The Washington Redskins.'

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid
programme.desc: Cartman must convince a qualifying committee that he's handicapped in order to win the Special Olympics. Meanwhile, Jimmy is determined to win the Olympics at any cost.

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Hitting rock bottom, Stan finds himself without a job, no bicycle and the only way out of his situation is to coach the peewee hockey team. Stan is about to find out that being a coach means facing his past, reliving a life he would rather leave behind.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.

programme.title: South Park: Sarcastaball
programme.desc: The people of South Park Elementary address the crisis in football concussions.

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure

programme.title: Designing Spaces: Remote Solutions for Home Offices
programme.desc: Working from home made easy with call-tracking technology, cloud communication solutions, project management tools and home office set-ups.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Let It Be
programme.desc: Derek and Addison Shepherd's professional relationship is challenged when their closest friends come to the hospital seeking a pre-emptive operation to avoid breast and ovarian cancer. George can't understand why a patient is unhappy to survive a fall.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Thanks for the Memories
programme.desc: The Thanksgiving holiday is more difficult for the interns and residents than any of them are willing to admit. Izzie plans a dinner at Meredith's but it remains to be seen who will show up. George endures the O'Malley tradition of hunting turkey.

programme.title: The Closer: Aftertaste
programme.desc: A young woman at a high-priced restaurant is murdered; Brenda turns 40.

programme.title: The Closer: To Protect and Serve
programme.desc: A murder hits close to home when a dead body is discovered in Detective Lt. Provenza's garage. When Provenza and Flynn want to make it to a Dodgers game on time, the body disappears and the Homicide Division tries to cover its negligence.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Curve Ball
programme.desc: Christmas vacation is interrupted for the division when a baseball scout is found dead in his RV. The squad works through the murder case, unfolding a complicated kidnapping scheme.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Risk Assessment
programme.desc: When a well-off graduate student gets shot to death in a gang-riddled neighbourhood, the division must work with the FBI to find his killer.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Year-End Blowout
programme.desc: A year-end-blowout sale becomes literal for a used car lot after one of its owners is killed when a bomb explodes. While the squad tries to find who is responsible, Rusty attempts to catch the person threatening his and Sharon's life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Killer Writing
programme.desc: John J. Lennon is a murderer that has built a literary career by writing about the prison system he lives in. Chris Cuomo talks with John J. Lennon about his crime, doing his time, and why he traded his gun for a pen.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: The Mind of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo goes inside a maximum-security prison for an exclusive interview with one of America’s most notorious serial killers, Joel Rifkin. Cuomo asks him tough questions about his sordid sex life, why he murdered and how he was caught.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Murder in the Family
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo speaks with Paris Lee Bennet to find out why he killed his sister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: My Way or the Highway

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: In Poor Taste Buds
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hellcopter
programme.desc: The joker that required medical attention during the fat foot race punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Nationals Disaster
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q fumble through the aisles of a grocery store and re-gift the kooky contents of a mystery bag. Then, the guys must seek out the chosen one, in an embarrassing needle-in-a-haystack challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Just Suck It

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Damien Lemonade
programme.desc: Find out what part of Morgan Murphy's body is just like an apple, Sean Patton gets really fired up over balls, and Yassir Lester is the self-proclaimed 'realest male feminist in the game.'

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: The Rubber Lover
programme.desc: Sean Patton has a minor breakdown, Julian McCullough proves he should never chaperone a school dance, and Marcella Arguello rises above all the height bashing.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Breakfast for Hookups

programme.desc: The Bella family packs up and heads to Flagstaff for an eventful Bella babymoon. Brie and the rest of the family are alarmed to learn that Nicole and Artem still haven’t made decisions about their future regarding baby Matteo.

programme.title: Total Bellas: A Bella Babyshower
programme.desc: The Bella babymoon in Flagstaff comes to an end, and Brie and Nicole disagree with their mom on who should be invited to their baby shower. Nicole's sexual frustration causes her to act out in surprising ways, including pregnant skinny dipping.

programme.title: Total Bellas: Bye Bye Bella
programme.desc: Nicole and Artem attempt to change their birthing plan so they can have their baby in Phoenix, but that ends up complicating things for the entire Bella family. Brie worries about how she'll deal with a new baby once Bryan goes back on the road.

programme.title: Total Bellas: Family Ties
programme.desc: The Bella family is shocked to learn that Kathy must undergo a risky, emergency brain surgery. With their due dates fast approaching, Brie and Nicole announce some surprising plans for the future.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family First
programme.desc: The girls recreate a legendary family video as part of Kris's epic 60th birthday bash. Meanwhile Khloé struggles to find a balance between supporting Lamar and returning to her daily life. Kendall worries that her family will get in the way of her dreams.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unforeseen Future
programme.desc: With her due date rapidly approaching and her baby breached, Kim learns that her house construction is delayed even further.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Colon All Cards

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: You Can't Handle the Truce

programme.title: North Woods Law: Breaking and Entering
programme.desc: Officer Lucas attempts to track down trespassers who tore up land owned by Fish and Game. On Mt. Mousilauke, Officer Towne races to assist an injured 11-year-old hiker and Officer Courtney confronts a group of fishermen about an illegal catch.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Weed Whackers
programme.desc: Officer Arsenault teams up with police to stake-out a marijuana grow in the middle of the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Officers Arsenault confronts a hunter accused of hunting too close to a school and damaging property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Caught in a Lie
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne respond to an ATV accident on a mountain summit in the middle of the night. Officer McKee attempts to reunite an exotic pet with its owner. Sergeant Dakai confronts a hunter he suspects of illegally baiting bears.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Wrangle Riders
programme.desc: Sgt. Lopashanski must handle a stubborn moose that has made its way onto a busy roadway, while a suspected illegal deer hunter plays a game of cat and mouse. A pair of raccoon cubs are rescued from the road, and a boy is found riding solo on an ATV.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: During a busy "Old Home Day", Officer Delmer patrols the ATV trails. Officer McFazden rescues a trapped barred owl and takes it to be rehabilitated. On Mount Liberty, Officer Towne and trainee LaTourneau save an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cliff Face Crisis
programme.desc: A horrific rock climbing accident on Cannon Cliffs sends two officers and an emergency team on a heroic helicopter rescue mission. A combative man is found illegally ridding an OHRV and is questioned by Officer Crouse, and a moose causes a traffic jam.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Wrangle Riders
programme.desc: Sgt. Lopashanski must handle a stubborn moose that has made its way onto a busy roadway, while a suspected illegal deer hunter plays a game of cat and mouse. A pair of raccoon cubs are rescued from the road, and a boy is found riding solo on an ATV.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Down to the Wire
programme.desc: The tail end of deer season tempts empty-handed hunters to break the law. The wardens work round the clock shifts to catch a night hunter and a family of armed felons. Spahr and Blanchard investigate a pair of deer shot under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: North Woods Law: And the Little Ones Too
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead beaver in a Skowhegan parking lot leads Warden Parker on an exhaustive investigation involving surveillance cameras, anonymous informants and the assistance of the local police.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: The wardens encounter all types of people willing to stretch the truth to get out of hot water. Warden Parker searches for a trigger-happy shooter in a family neighborhood. Sergeant Spahr and Warden Lounder investigate a suspiciously shot turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: For a game warden, there's no such thing as being off the clock. Wardens McBrine and Carter embark on a multi-day hunt for a wanted man. Warden Herring investigates a mysterious shack on city property. Warden McKenney works to remove a deadly hazard.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Island of Snakes
programme.desc: Steve travels to Sri Lanka to investigate why this country has the highest incidents of snakebite deaths in the world. In his hands on approach, Steve joins rice paddy workers, buffalo herders, and tea pickers to find many venomous species in their midst.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodile Coast
programme.desc: Steve, Terri and Bindi venture along the west Australian coast in search of crocodiles and sharks. They encounter wild crocodiles in the thick oozie mud of the Kimberley Coast. Also, on a reef off the coast, Steve dives with a mass of sea snakes.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Africa's Last Frontier
programme.desc: Steve visits Namibia, the driest place on earth harboring only a few precious waterholes spread across the desolate landscape. Steve is witness to the daily struggle for survival and encounters the dangerous, hard to wrangle, zebra spitting snake.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Otter Tale
programme.desc: Beloved Asian small-clawed otter Pinkie has a recurring bloody nose, and the team goes to great lengths to find out what could be causing it. Feisty baby American alligators arrive at the aquarium and must learn to eat in an orderly way.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ready for the Jelly
programme.desc: A sweet beluga whale trains with staff to go on the 'whale scale.' Blacktip reef shark L2 is not eating normally and staff work to figure out why. See the first sea lion born at the aquarium.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Toddler Sea Lion Scarlett
programme.desc: A southern sea otter is rushed to the health center. The team travels to Key Largo to help coral restoration efforts. Young African penguins prepare for an upcoming event. Love is in the air for a trainer and his favorite sea lion pup, Scarlett.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ophelia the Octopus
programme.desc: Two rescued sea lions arrive at the aquarium, and trainers help prepare them for an upcoming eye surgery. The team travels to the Bahamas to research the effects of plastics in the ocean on sharks. The aquarium conducts a study to help wild beluga whales.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Penguins in Love
programme.desc: A staff member heads to the Marine Mammal Center in California to help in rehabilitation efforts of elephant seals. African penguins Charlie and Lizzie have been together for 25 years, and Charlie is having issues with his eyes. A piranha needs surgery.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Baby Otter Rescue
programme.desc: The team welcomes two rescued southern sea otter pups, Mara and Gibson, from the California coast. Young ruddy ducks arrive at the aquarium and are introduced to their new habitat. Nandi, the aquarium's smallest manta ray, is due for her annual checkup.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Dolphin Doctor
programme.desc: Polka, a bottlenose dolphin, has a raspy voice and needs to see the doctor to get the all-clear. Staff excitedly prepare for the upcoming puffin breeding season. Two woebegone sharks are due for a checkup. A curious and active box turtle goes for a walk.

programme.title: Feherty: Bryson DeChambeau

programme.title: Feherty: Henrik Stenson
programme.desc: David Feherty sits down with major champion Henrik Stenson for an insightful and often humorous discussion about the Swedish golfer’s life and career. The pair discuss the stellar season, five Ryder Cup appearances, the Olympics in Rio and more.

programme.title: Feherty: Scott Van Pelt
programme.desc: David sits down to cover it all with the man who’s covered it all: Scott Van Pelt. SVP dives deep into the archives to chat about his time at Golf Channel, how he got on television in the first place, his forgettable semester ay Maryland and more.

programme.title: Feherty: Gary Woodland
programme.desc: David sits down with the 2019 US Open Champion, Gary Woodland, to discuss life, Pebble Beach and the impact he made on a young fan that in turn impacted his own life.

programme.title: Feherty: Ian Woosnam
programme.desc: David visits his long-time friend and former Ryder Cup teammate, Ian Woosnam, at his home in Barbados. The pair discuss Woosnam’s climb from farm boy to world number 1, their vagabond days on the European Tour, and Ian’s Hall of Fame career.

programme.title: Feherty: Brooks Koepka
programme.desc: Feherty sits poolside in south Florida with 2018 U.S. Open and PGA champion Brooks Koepka. Discussions include a no-nonsense look at his unconventional road to elite status, his three career defining major wins and his outspoken approach to stardom.

programme.title: Feherty: Shane Lowry
programme.desc: David sits down with 2019 Open champion Shane Lowry. This spirited player from the Republic of Ireland recalls all the inside stories from his remarkable major victory and why he wouldn’t change a thing about the compelling journey that got him there.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The German Halberd
programme.desc: Dave Baker's favourite blade, the Scottish Dirk, must be forged by the smiths. Then, two finalists must recreate the German Halberd, a vicious medieval era weapon.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Wind and Fire Wheels
programme.desc: A bicycle presents the first challenge for the smiths, who must use its parts to forge their signature blade. Afterward, the two advancing smiths are challenged to recreate the ancient, intriguing weapon known as wind and fire wheels.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Bhuj
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must forge a canister damascus out of an old barber's chair, using only barbershop tools. One competitor must restart with only 45 minutes remaining. The two finalists are tasked with recreating a fine, fierce weapon, the Bhuj.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Ikakalaka
programme.desc: Four smiths are forced to select a forging technique, a decision that will impact their next round. Ultimately, two smiths will be chosen to recreate the Ikakalaka African Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Massive Maguro Bocho
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging a cleaver using steel from meat hooks. After two rounds, two smiths forge the Maguro Bocho, a massive tuna knife.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Teeth of the Tegha
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging signature blades from a burnt up car. After rounds of testing, two smiths head home to recreate the Serrated Tegha Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: M1905 Springfield Bayonet
programme.desc: Four smiths must use their math skills to determine how much steel they need to make their signature blades. After several rounds, two smiths return home to build the intricate M1905 Springfield Bayonet.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Dream-A-Rooney
programme.desc: 'Voltage' is taking up all of Liv's time, but when The Dream is asked to reunite for a fundraiser, Liv is determined to make it happen. Meanwhile, Maddie tries to figure out where to go to college.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Home Run-A-Rooney

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Spas & Spices

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Solos and Stray Kitties
programme.desc: Trish books an audition for Ally, who discovers she’s performing with an all-girl band and not as a soloist. In attempt to save the day, Austin, Dez and Trish band together and cause a distraction so Ally can sing solo.

programme.title: Sofia the First: King for a Day

programme.title: Sofia the First: When You Wish Upon a Well

programme.desc: When a wrathful killer strikes a small Alaskan village, investigators must untangle a truly twisted romance to find out what led to this rage filled stabbing.

programme.desc: The disappearance of a devoted father reveals a treasure trove of family secrets and exposes a twisted plot driven by greed.

programme.desc: In a case that became a media firestorm, a powerful lawyer and his new bride are slain, and detectives try to track down a scorned socialite, unearthing twisted tales of adultery, restraining orders, and alleged abuse.

programme.desc: The murder of a devoted family man leads investigators through a twisted tale of infidelity, betrayal and one woman’s deadly plan.

programme.desc: A twisted sense of justice leads a pair of demented newlyweds to lure an unsuspecting victim on Craigslist.

programme.desc: A beloved grandmother and her new husband go missing, triggering an investigation that reveals a twisted tale of first love and a motive fueled by obsession and greed.

programme.desc: In the fish-eat-fish world of the Ocean if you can eat, you can also, get eaten.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Crop Circles
programme.desc: Crop circles spotted on an island in the Mediterranean might not be from aliens, but from a threat closer to home: Nazis; new discoveries help experts uncover who made them and for what sinister purpose.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Imhotep's Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: After satellites spot an anomaly at Egypt's oldest pyramid, experts uncover a long-lost labyrinth. It could lead them to the darkest secrets of Imhotep, the mysterious high priest who built this strange complex.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant in the hidden churches of Ethiopia; A great white shark is attacked by a mystery undersea predator; Strange shapes on the Italian countryside might be ghostly remnants of a wealthy Roman.

programme.title: BattleBots: Blood, Sweat and Gears
programme.desc: Former Giant Nut winner Tombstone takes on rookie Slap Box and the part-frog, part-killer robot Ribbot takes on the feline-inspired MadCatter. Giant walker-bot Chomp makes its debut and End Game takes on Bloodsport in a messy main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Mega Fights: Veteran Bots Collide!
programme.desc: Veteran bots are desperate for a win as Giant Nut runner-up Witch Doctor faces Kraken in an epic showdown. Flipper-bot Hydra has a big surprise in store, and newcomer Jackpot takes its chances against a seasoned Ghost Raptor.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: BattleBots: Mega Fights: Veteran Bots Collide!
programme.desc: Veteran bots are desperate for a win as Giant Nut runner-up Witch Doctor faces Kraken in an epic showdown. Flipper-bot Hydra has a big surprise in store, and newcomer Jackpot takes its chances against a seasoned Ghost Raptor.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: BattleBots: Blood, Sweat and Gears
programme.desc: Former Giant Nut winner Tombstone takes on rookie Slap Box and the part-frog, part-killer robot Ribbot takes on the feline-inspired MadCatter. Giant walker-bot Chomp makes its debut and End Game takes on Bloodsport in a messy main event.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: The Torture Escape
programme.desc: No one knows how Harry Houdini pulled off his death-defying escapes, but now, a team of experts investigate his water torture illusion to reveal the secrets of this mysterious feat. What they uncover suggests Houdini might have led a double life as a spy.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: To Catch a Bullet
programme.desc: A team of experts re-create one of the deadliest tricks in magic history to uncover how Houdini could have pulled off the feat that killed many of his peers.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: Siberian Prison Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of Houdini's greatest escapes might have been a deep-cover conspiracy to spy for the American government and experts recreate his break from a Siberian prison transport to investigate the mysteries behind this incredible feat.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Revenge of the Nazi Doppelganger
programme.desc: Startling new evidence suggests that Hitler's second-in-command was secretly replaced by a doppelganger to escape war crimes and impending justice; armed with cutting-edge forensic science, a team of experts investigates.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Mystery at Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three inmates are said to have escaped from Alcatraz prison, but even today, it's never been proven. New evidence might finally crack this notorious cold case, as experts use forensic science and cutting-edge tech to investigate fresh leads.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Nazi Doomsday Project
programme.desc: Brand-new evidence reveals the secrets of a Nazi program to build a nuclear bomb, and using cutting-edge science and tech, experts uncover classified files that reveal how close Hitler came to this terrifying superweapon.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: A team of experts use the latest science and cutting-edge technology to investigate if extraterrestrial life has contacted humankind, and what they discover could reveal if there's an international conspiracy to cover it all up.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Mystery of Doomsday Jungle
programme.desc: When 400 earthquakes strike a remote jungle in Mexico over just two weeks, dozens of UFO sightings are reported nearby, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this bizarre event is the smoking gun evidence of alien contact.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Hunt for the Alien Relics
programme.desc: New clues suggest that aliens were in contact with the ancient cultures of Mesoamerica, and to prove it, a team of experts hunt down mysterious artifacts that could change everything we know about our place in the cosmos.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: The Volcano Enigma
programme.desc: New evidence points to a strange link between UFO sightings and volcanoes, and to test the explosive theory, a team of experts investigate one of the most mysterious mass reports of alien contact in history.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Alien Crater of Doom
programme.desc: New discoveries of strange evidence in the forests of Argentina suggest an alien craft landed here, and to prove it, a team of experts use cutting edge technology to investigate the area and hunt down the truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Down for the Count
programme.desc: Hikers stumble onto the brutalized corpse of amateur boxer Johnnie Wilson, hidden beneath a pile of branches. Plagued by false starts and blind alleys, the case finally gains traction when investigators get their hands dirty.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it's up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Rest in Peace
programme.desc: When an Air Force veteran dies unexpectedly, Kenda and his team must determine if it was a tragic accident or premeditated murder. But before long, they discover that their clean-cut victim had a secret life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cynthia
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. When all leads dry up, the case runs cold. But years later, Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Down by Fire
programme.desc: Ryne Zahner is an inspiration to his high school math students in Arizona. His friends see him as one of the nicest people they know. When a hooded murderer guns him down after a night of partying, the entire community struggles to grasp his murder.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: So Hateful
programme.desc: When 46-year-old Anthony Edwards is found shot in the park, his family has no idea who would want to bring harm to a man that was loved by so many. Using modern technology and forensic testing, detectives are determined to bring his killer to justice.

programme.title: Killer ID
programme.desc: A deputy is able to help solve his own murder with a clever habit that ultimately was his final action.

programme.title: True Conviction: Murder at the Barbershop
programme.desc: A beloved Pensacola barber is gunned down in his shop in broad daylight. DNA evidence left at the scene may hold the key to solving this murder mystery.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: So Hateful
programme.desc: When 46-year-old Anthony Edwards is found shot in the park, his family has no idea who would want to bring harm to a man that was loved by so many. Using modern technology and forensic testing, detectives are determined to bring his killer to justice.

programme.title: Killer ID
programme.desc: A deputy is able to help solve his own murder with a clever habit that ultimately was his final action.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Stalker
programme.desc: After computer whiz Cari Farver goes missing, she starts sending threatening text messages to a new boyfriend, his ex-lover and her mother.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Down by Fire
programme.desc: Ryne Zahner is an inspiration to his high school math students in Arizona. His friends see him as one of the nicest people they know. When a hooded murderer guns him down after a night of partying, the entire community struggles to grasp his murder.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: A top real estate agent in Little Rock, Arkansas fails to return home after showing a house to a client.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: Jimmy McClain, a beloved basketball coach and teacher, is found brutally murdered in his own home. With no forced entry, police fear Jimmy knew his killer or let the killer inside his house.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Friends to the End
programme.desc: A close-knit group of co-workers are devastated when one of their own is found dead near a soccer field at the edge of their quiet Indiana town.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Devil in the Dance Hall
programme.desc: A murder within the small square dancing community of Texarkana, Arkansas leads investigators through a gauntlet of suspects with alibies and potential motives- including love triangles, jealousy and lots of money.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Family Lies
programme.desc: A reunited family begins to point fingers at each other when a house fire kills one of their own. And somewhere in the ashes are the clues to a murder.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Under My Thumb
programme.desc: From the womb, the Cormier twins are partners in mischief. But as they get older, their innocent antics devolve into a much darker game. Soon, the battle for reality and fantasy bleeds into real life threatening to tear the twins apart.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Do No Harm
programme.desc: In the small town of Hamilton, OH, twin pediatricians earn their community's trust. But the Blankenburg twins harbor secrets no one can believe. Then, the Samel twins in Grand Rapids, MI, commit a crime that will shock their neighborhood for decades.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Fire for Freedom
programme.desc: Identical twins Caleb and Joshua are the apples of their father's eye, but the pressure to be exceptional manifests into dangerous hatred. Isolated from the world, their seclusion fuels a need to break free at any cost.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He Seems Perfect
programme.desc: Budding New York fashion designer Jenae Aragosa falls hard for bartender Trevor Frederick. But as a dark side of her new man comes to light, Jenae comes to realize she'll be lucky if she makes it out of this relationship alive.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Devil Went Down to Georgia
programme.desc: After a recent encounter with a peeping tom outside his daughter's bedroom window and another with a masked man in his own hallway, Jerry Glaser thinks someone is trying to kill him and takes his life into his own hands to protect himself and his family.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: One Last Goodbye
programme.desc: After breaking free from her controlling ex-husband, single mom Tanya Petro doesn't have much time to date. Until she meets Ron Gibson and falls helplessly in love with him. But just a few months into the relationship, Tanya mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Twisted Plan
programme.desc: When trusted legal assistant Gail Spencer fails to show up for work, her coworkers are rightfully concerned. But as the sordid details of her abduction come to light, suddenly it seems like someone at the office may know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: All-American Landmarks
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, discover the real truth behind some of America's greatest landmarks.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The New World
programme.desc: There is more to the explorers who discovered America than we have been told. Learn that Christopher Columbus never stepped foot in North America and Hernán Cortés didn't defeat the Aztecs by himself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fire In the Sky
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths behind extraterrestrial spacecraft and we learn the truth of two pioneering flights.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood 4 H Camp
programme.desc: The crew visits the oldest statewide 4H Camp in the country and teach a team of teenagers how to build a log cabin. Mark and Sherman compete as archery coaches and Johnny learns the pioneer craft of paper marbling.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Catskills Cabin: The Whole Story
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders visit a new region of the Appalachian mountains.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Dairy Barn Danger
programme.desc: In Orwigsburg, Pennsylvania, the Barnwood Builders save one of the biggest barns they have ever seen. This dangerous demolition demands the best of everyone.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hidden History
programme.desc: The crew saves an Ohio barn built with incredible craftsmanship and Mark scouts another barn that turns out to be a keeper. Later, he visits a massive timber-frame barn that was perfectly restored on its original site and converted into a restaurant.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: A Load of Trouble: Part 1
programme.desc: Josette and Jeff's home inspector said their sloped floors were typical of a home this age, but Mike thinks a Holmes inspection will prove him wrong. Damon and the crew are on hand to prop up the pieces.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Old Stagecoach Inn
programme.desc: Hosts Mike & Robert salvage a house previously damaged by a tornado near Abingdon, VA. Key items include floors, doors, and a complete staircase. While at the warehouse, Mike makes a commissioned desk for a child from a balance beam.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Distractions and Disagreements
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in a revolving door of disagreements over hardwood flooring, exterior brick, and a lively debate about dishwashers. MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Budget Bungalow
programme.desc: Michael sees potential in what once was a Victorian bungalow that has been eaten away by termites leaving catastrophic damage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem for an Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beauty and the Beef
programme.desc: It's love at first bite as Noah Cappe munches on some Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin. With a tagline of "where Western meets weird," the Rodeo is the place to find one-of-a-kind carnival eats like the Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases some of the best of coastal cuisine in a top 15 countdown of the most delicious dishes inspired by America's oceans, lakes and rivers. There are wasabi salmon burgers in Alaska, crab cakes by the Chesapeake Bay and more in between.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Here's the Beef
programme.desc: From a high-end steak house in Manhattan to a rib joint in Oklahoma, we take you to the most sizzling hotspots for beef in the U.S.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Best of the Midwest
programme.desc: From seriously saucy barbecue sandwiches to nachos on a pizza and the perfect burger for Dirty Dancing, these restaurants serve up some of the best dishes in America's heartland.
