programme.desc: Catman thinks that Timmy has been kidnapped. Timmy wishes that his dad was mayor.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crockin' the House/ Tardy Sauce
programme.desc: Mrs. Crocker leaves Mr. Crocker home alone for the first time, so he calls on Timmy to teach him how to have fun. Chloe wants to break the attendance record, but Timmy tells her school is canceled and drags her to a taco stand.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Sorry, Wrong Era
programme.desc: Jimmy invents a device to go back in time.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Beach Party Mummy
programme.desc: Bored by class discussions, Jimmy decides to take his classmates to see the real thing.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy: Pup Goes the Weasel/ Puppy Pause
programme.desc: The Weasel, a super diabolical criminal, has broken out of prison and is after Dudley and Snaptrap. Dudley finds gloves that stop time, Snaptrap steals them, and TUFF must get them back before time stops forever.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard
programme.desc: Otis and his friends have adventures while trying to protect the farm they live on.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pizza Dash/ Glory Days
programme.desc: The town is under attack when Simon creates a drone that can not only deliver pizzas but has the ability to learn.Alvin worries the munks are responsible for making Dave boring when they find out he used to be a rock star.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Rose by Any Other Name/ Queen Bee
programme.desc: Simon's experiment of how plants respond to positive or negative feedback creates a monster, and it is growing. Brittany's fear of bees turns into admiration when she's shrunk down to their size and experiences life as a bee.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Across the Universe/ Brit's Picks
programme.desc: Alvin bets Bo Carter that alien life exists and only has a week to prove it or suffer embarrassing consequences; Brittany's furious when she thinks Alvin has been writing on her blog.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Spoiler-Itis/ Something's Fishy
programme.desc: When Alvin is accused of revealing spoilers for everyone's favorite TV show, he agrees not to speak for 24 hours. Alvin and Simon think Theodore's pet goldfish has died.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Pizza Face
programme.desc: Mikey discovers that a new mutant is trying to attack and capture people using living pizzas, but he struggles to convince the others who don't believe him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Legend of Kuro Kabuto
programme.desc: Leo, worried about Karai, tries to convince the others to rescue her, while a master thief steals Shredder's helmet, and it falls into the Turtles' unsuspecting hands.

programme.desc: Evox and his minions hatch the ultimate plan to take over the Morphin Grid.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Evox: Upgraded

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Stuck on You/ Al Be Back

programme.title: It's Pony: Distractions/ The Giving Chair

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Musical Cliptastic Countdown
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram host a viewers' choice countdown special featuring the Top 10 favorite musical numbers.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne

programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: My Dad is Cooler Than Your Dad

programme.title: Walk the Prank: So You Think You Can Middle School Dance

programme.desc: Jean Grey develops dangerous powers that make her a risk to the X-Men.

programme.title: Movie: Walk of Shame
programme.desc: Following a one-night stand, an aspiring TV news anchor wakes up to find herself stranded in an unfamiliar part of town with no phone, money or car. To top it off, she has eight hours to somehow make it to the most important job interview of her life.

programme.title: Movie: Flags of Our Fathers
programme.desc: The iconic photograph of American soldiers raising the flag on the island of Iwo Jima after the devastating battle leads to dramatic crises of conscience for the survivors involved.

programme.title: Movie: The King of Staten Island
programme.desc: A man struggles to come to terms after the death of his father.

programme.title: 30 Coins
programme.desc: Reality is distorted by a cursed coin which is at the heart of a global conspiracy.

programme.title: Movie: Midway
programme.desc: The story of the Battle of Midway.

programme.title: Movie: Lola Versus
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman dumped by her fiancé just three weeks before their wedding embarks on a series of adventures to help her come to terms with approaching 30 as a single woman.

programme.title: Under the Grapefruit Tree: The CC Sabathia Story
programme.desc: New York Yankees pitcher Carsten Charles 'CC' Sabathia, Jr. narrates his story, chronicling the highs and lows of his career and looking back on his legacy as one of the game's pre-eminent pitchers.

programme.title: Movie: Billy Madison
programme.desc: A hotel tycoon named Brian Madison has doubts about his immature and non-educated son's ability to run the family business. His son agrees to repeat elementary and high school to prove that he is worthy to take over his father's hotel empire.

programme.title: Movie: Dolittle
programme.desc: A doctor with the ability to communicate with animals attempts to find an island of legend alongside his young apprentice and a group of pets.

programme.title: Movie: Beasts of the Southern Wild
programme.desc: A six-year-old girl leaves her hometown to search for her mother after her father's health crisis releases fictional creatures into the wild.

programme.title: Movie: A Hidden Life
programme.desc: A Catholic farmer refuses to fight for the Nazis.

programme.title: Movie: The Eagle
programme.desc: A Roman soldier is determined to honour his dead father's memory by retrieving a lost family emblem.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover police officer infiltrates an L.A. street gang in order to crack a hijacking ring.

programme.title: Movie: The Big Lebowski
programme.desc: After having his rug soiled during a case of mistaken identity, Jeff Lebowski, preferably known as The Dude, seeks reimbursement. Before long, The Dude and his buddies are caught up in a deadly kidnapping during a weekend of bowling and pie stick rituals.

programme.title: Movie: While We're Young
programme.desc: A middle-aged, childless couple undergoes a significant life change when they strike up a friendship with a couple of fun-loving, spontaneous 20-somethings.

programme.title: Shameless: NIMBY
programme.desc: The Milkoviches move in next door and wreak havoc, leading Frank, Kev and Liam to plot how to get rid of them. Mickey embarks on a new security gig for Kev and V and drags Ian along against his will.

programme.title: Movie: Tommy Boy
programme.desc: A young man is faced with the task of saving his father's plant and hometown economy.

programme.title: Movie: National Lampoon's Animal House
programme.desc: A wild and disruptive fraternity resists their college dean's attempts to expel them.

programme.title: Movie: Belushi
programme.desc: A look at the life of the beloved American icon, John Belushi, through the viewpoint of his friends and family.

programme.title: Your Honor: Part Six
programme.desc: Adam spends the day with a dangerous new love interest, while Michael searches for his blackmailer. Lee ramps up her involvement in Kofi's case.

programme.title: Movie: Oasis: Supersonic
programme.desc: The Gallagher brothers explore their long and troubled career as part of the band Oasis. As they narrate their explosive rise to becoming the biggest band in Britain, they pick apart their own torrid relationship, which had its extreme ups and downs.

programme.title: Movie: The Wiz
programme.desc: A young schoolteacher in a magical land sets off in search of a legendary wizard.

programme.title: Movie: Top Gun
programme.desc: Personal tragedy leads a cocky, undisciplined navy pilot to reassess his abilities and his career.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Carl Meets a Lady
programme.desc: Carl tries to secure a date with an attractive woman he meets at the diner.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Queasy Rider

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Old Bike Yarn
programme.desc: Caroline takes an abandoned bicycle in order to start a delivery service for their cupcake business but discovers that Max never learned to ride one.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask

programme.title: Black-ish: Super Rich Kids
programme.desc: Dre has always felt his older son was never like him, but when he finally meets Junior's cool friends, Dre is all in and happy that his son may have the opportunity for an actual social life.

programme.title: Black-ish: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: Dre, determined to make up for the no-frills, last-minute wedding he and Bow had, organizes an amazing vow renewal for their 15th anniversary, but when Bow's hippie-dippy parents show up unannounced, bombshells are dropped and old disagreements re-ignite.

programme.title: Riverdale: Chapter Seventy-Six: Killing Mr. Honey
programme.desc: After receiving a letter from the University of Iowa asking him to submit a story, Jughead works on a twisted tale about the gang's revenge fantasy against Principal Honey for all the ways he's ruined their senior year.

programme.title: Nancy Drew: The Clue in the Captain's Painting
programme.desc: Nancy and the Drew Crew investigate a mysterious death which also leads to new details regarding the Aglaeca curse.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Opera
programme.desc: Jerry meets Elaine at the opera, unaware that her new boyfriend is Crazy Joe Davola.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Checks
programme.desc: When hundreds of small royalty checks pour in from a Japanese television show, Jerry and George decide to adapt their pilot idea for Japanese television. Kramer entertains Japanese businessmen and has them sleeping in a chest of drawers.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Apologies for the Frivolity
programme.desc: Though Charlie despises his sharp-tongued, passive aggressive mother, he's strangely attracted to Lydia, an attractive, blonde high-end real estate agent, just like his mother. Unfortunately, the similarities don't end there.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Repeated Blows to His Unformed Head
programme.desc: When Berta brings her pregnant daughter, the one she thought would make something of herself, to Charlie's house to help clean, Alan gets to satisfy one of his secret fetishes. Meanwhile, Charlie ventures out of his familiar Malibu surroundings.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Flashy Little Flashdancer

programme.title: Mom: Turkey Meatballs and a Getaway Car

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Sink Hole
programme.desc: When Mike and Boyd narrowly miss a sinkhole on the interstate, Boyd becomes petrified of leaving the house. Matters get more complicated when Mike and Ryan have different opinions on how best to ease Boyd's fears.
